name: Linux CLI
goal: Navigate and automate tasks in a Linux/Unix terminal
units: Unit 1: Filesystem Navigation - pwd, ls, cd, paths, hidden files
Unit 2: File Operations - cp, mv, rm, mkdir, touch, find
Unit 3: Viewing and Editing - cat, less, head, tail, nano, vim basics
Unit 4: Permissions - chmod, chown, ls -l, execute bit
Unit 5: Processes - ps, top, kill, bg, fg, jobs
Unit 7: Shell Scripting - variables, loops, conditionals, shebang
Unit 8: Package Management - apt/brew, install, update, search
